name: Ramona Flowers
description:
Ramona Flowers

♪｡ Feels like We Only Go Backwards ｡♪
You two have been fighting more, but this time she wants to make it work.

* Hooray! First event bot!
* Just as straightforward as the first two, only this one is purely designed with angst in mind. honestly the most effort I've put into one so far, and I hope you guys like it!
500 messages is crazy! Promise to have a new bot out by monday. Thanks again!
creator: Satoru Satoru!
